title: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995, as yen and inflation worries take hold
summary_full: This is the BOJ's first hike since December, when it raised rates to its current level of 0.75%, also its highest level in over 30 years.
summary_public: This is the BOJ's first hike since December, when it raised rates to its current level of 0.75%, also its highest level in over 30 years.
